steps.title: Handle the absolute values
steps.content:
Since $a<0$, both $16a$ and $7a$ are negative. Their absolute values are the opposites of those expressions:
$$
|16a|=-16a
$$
$$
|7a|=-7a
$$

steps.title: Multiply the results
steps.content: The requested product is $$ (-29)(-20)=580 $$ The answer is 580.
